name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Plano's TitleMax Title Loans location on Coit Rd offers quick title loans to local residents.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans in Plano, TX operates at 213 Coit Rd as a standalone location serving Plano residents. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays.

At this Plano location, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral. The team at 213 Coit Rd is ready to help with your application. For questions or to start the process, call +1 972-295-7324 directly.

If you're a Plano resident needing quick cash, bring your government ID, vehicle title, and proof of residency to your appointment. TitleMax provides fast title loan approvals to borrowers in the local area.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee. This is a lending product governed by state-specific loan contracts. Contact TitleMax directly for rate and term details.

certifications: Texas Credit Access Business (CAB) / Credit Service Organization (CSO)

pros: No credit check required — bad credit and no credit history both accepted
No bank account required to qualify for any loan product
Funds available in as little as 30 minutes at in-store locations
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle throughout the loan term
1,000+ physical store locations across ~16 states for in-person service
No prepayment penalty — pay off early to reduce total interest cost
Mobile app (iOS/Android) and online portal for balance, payment schedule, and payoff management
cons: APR typically 100%–300% based on third-party sources — among the highest-cost consumer loan products available
Vehicle repossession is a documented risk if the loan is not repaid on time
Rates and terms not publicly disclosed on the website — must apply or call to get actual figures
High complaint volume on BBB and ComplaintsBoard (2.0/5, ~87 complaints) including repossession disputes and payment issues
Only available in approximately 16 states — unavailable to the majority of U.S. borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with bad credit or no credit history who need same-day cash and cannot qualify for a bank loan or credit card
Borrowers who do not have a bank account but own a car or motorcycle with a clear title
People facing an urgent cash need between $500 and $10,000 who can repay quickly to minimize high interest costs
Georgia residents needing a title pawn as an alternative to a conventional title loan
diagnosis: TitleMax is genuinely useful for cash-urgent borrowers with bad credit who own a vehicle outright — the speed, accessibility, and no-credit-check model are real advantages when traditional options are closed. The core caveat is cost: triple-digit APRs and the risk of losing your vehicle to repossession make TitleMax a high-stakes option that should only be considered when cheaper alternatives have been exhausted.
services: Title pawns (Georgia stores only, legally distinct from title loans)
Unsecured personal loans (up to $2,500, no collateral required)
Online loan applications (select states via online.titlemax.com)
In-store loan processing at 1,000+ locations across ~16 states
Mobile app account management (iOS and Android)
Online account portal (account.titlemax.com) for balance and payment schedule
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 213 Coit Rd, Plano, TX. Quick title loans using your vehicle as collateral.
